vivid/border/radius/sm.$description: Small border radius for subtle rounding, used on compact elements such as checkboxes.

vivid/border/radius/md.$description: Medium border radius for smaller components such as buttons, and inputs.

vivid/border/radius/lg.$description: A large border radius for container elements such as dialogs and cards.

vivid/border/radius/full.$description: A fully rounded border radius that produces a pill or circle shape.
